_instructions: Copy this file to profile.json and fill every field. The Swarm reads profile.json to configure all nodes automatically — targeting, email sequences, SEO keywords, and campaign goals all come from here. You never need to touch the code.

business.name: Your Company Name
business.description: One or two sentences describing what you do and who you serve.

primary.name: Your Core Offer Name
primary.trial: Describe any free trial or guarantee
primary.pain_solved: The specific problem this offer solves
primary.outcome: The concrete result the client achieves

sender.persona: Describe the sender voice: e.g. 'friendly consultant, not salesy, uses short sentences'

icp.description: One sentence portrait of your ideal client, e.g. 'Owner-operated restaurants with 1-3 locations in the US'
pain_points: Pain point your ICP feels most acutely
exclude_keywords: words in a company name that disqualify them, e.g. 'franchise'

email_sequences.tone: conversational and direct, no corporate speak

step_1.subject_angle: Reference their specific pain point — do not pitch yet
step_1.body_notes: 3 sentences max. Acknowledge a problem, hint at a solution, single soft CTA.

step_2.body_notes: 2-4 sentences. Social proof or quick stat. Ask a qualifying question.

step_3.subject_angle: Final follow-up — low pressure break-up style
step_3.body_notes: 2-3 sentences. Leave door open. Offer a resource or next step.

content_angles: The real cost of [pain point] for [ICP type]
Why [old solution] is failing [industry] owners in [year]
